Jolt  

Description

1: Decrease Hate by 500

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 60 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 1.5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Deletable: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Single Spell Type: Detrimental
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your head snaps back.
Cast on other: Soandso 's head snaps back.

Game Description

Strikes your target's head, sometimes causing partial memory loss.

Items with this effect

  • Huntsman's Cleaver
  • Outrider's Taming Whip
  • Spell: Jolt

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Jolt
ClassLevel
RNG50
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (19)
  • Sold By (5)
  • Screenshots

# Aug 30 2004 at 7:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591803150720
28 posts
its sold in PoK to. most spells are.
▲ Page top
Evade b4 Jolt
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2003 at 8:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246075522
8 posts
Hey, Crackers (interesting name) -- I find nothing about Evade and making a button. Perhaps you could post how it's done? PLease? hmmm? many thanks
▲ Page top
RE: Evade b4 Jolt
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2004 at 8:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787816227
118 posts
Rangers cannot "evade" to lower agro. This is a special ability of rogues. Using their hide skill during combat they recieve a change to lower agro. Rangers get the spell jolt to lower agro.
▲ Page top
RE: Evade b4 Jolt
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2004 at 6:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782757621
5 posts
Nah

You don't use Jolt to evade like rogues use hide. Rogues use hide as a way of loosing aggro, and it works quite well.
What you do is, you make a hotkey for your rogue.
Ex:
/attack off
/doa #(insert hide here)
/attack on

and that's it. hide always works at higher lvls, but evade only works like 60% of the time. Roughly estimated.

Hope this helps
▲ Page top
RE: Evade b4 Jolt
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2004 at 7:57 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591803150720
28 posts
ok been a long long time since ive played a rogue but if memory serves....

To evade u must have hide skill

go into combat smack the mob with your swords.. if u start gaining agro turn off auto attack and hit hide... if u hide successfuly it lowers the agro by quite a bit, if u dont your agro will rise
▲ Page top
PoK Vendor
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2003 at 12:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777313223
10 posts
The vendor that sells this in PoK is Pathfinder Viliken at -20, 920,67. 2 floors up from library entrance.

tell me about it
QuoteReply
# Nov 01 2003 at 3:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570890684
9 posts
i am a 53 ranger and i have beed the mt for every thing from pc to hhk to dl and now i get killed if i try it so this is the best thing for a ranger
▲ Page top
Pull With Jolt
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2003 at 12:04 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592258608490
View User Forum
35 posts
I have taken to pulling mobs with jolt. How can you pull with a negative hate? Well you can.

The nice thing is when mob is incoming, a single arrow moves tank to top of hate list. The Tank does not need to gain agro. As puller you are already at negative hate.

-wogai
▲ Page top
Before Jolt
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2003 at 3:02 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780128051
49 posts
Before I had Jolt I use to use Evade (yes the Rogue Skill) to decrease agro. its simple just lookup evade and it will tell you how to set up a hot button.

Edited, Thu Jul 10 03:54:53 2003
▲ Page top
jolt
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2003 at 9:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780881890
5 posts
Thanks, I'll have to give it a try.
▲ Page top
RE: jolt
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2003 at 9:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257178876
View User Forum
21 posts
Also handy to always have it memmed during combat, since as a Ranger, I often times out-damage my MT to the point that I draw agro, and in the planes, that's the quickest way to a dead ranger. However, periodic casts of this throughout a fight help immensely with agro control.
▲ Page top
Jolt
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2003 at 12:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780881890
5 posts
What does this spell do other than decrease Hate? What good is it?
▲ Page top
RE: Jolt
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2003 at 6:41 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361685731
116 posts
Believe me Oak, by the time you can get this you will so want it. Since I am routinely the snarer in plane groups, this is very neccessary. One snare will pull the mob off the tank if that is the only thing I do, not to mention dottin and nukin, my sta isn't my best stat (stupid when I started my ranger), and when you're in a plane where the stuff is hittin for well over 200 (just entry lvl planes btw), you need to be able to get stuff offa ya or you get your cleric mighty angry. It's really hard to switch between or 2 sometime 3 targets gettin off different heals as a cleric. Just ask em, this is perhaps one of the best spells for rangers until we get cinder jolt.
▲ Page top
RE: Jolt
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2003 at 9:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256603004
28 posts
I rather think that's the point - reduce hate. In other words, a Ranger pulls for a group and gets all the aggro from the MOB, casts Jolt and then the aggro can be switched to the main tank.
▲ Page top
